title: Closing with Confidence
objective: Guide the guest to a clear, confident decision by presenting numbers simply, confirming alignment with their priorities, addressing concerns calmly, and asking for commitment without pressure.
learning_outcomes: Present numbers with clarity and calm confidence.
Use a simple close structure: recap, numbers, confirm, commit.
Separate questions, concerns, and objections during the close.
Use two-option choice architecture to reduce anxiety and delay.
Handle common closing stalls such as payment, shopping, spouse/partner, and I need to think.
Ask for commitment in a respectful, professional way.
End with clean next steps so the guest feels in control.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus only on Module 8: Closing with Confidence. Coach salespeople on presenting numbers clearly, recapping guest priorities, using strategic silence, separating questions from concerns and objections, handling payment stalls, shopping, spouse/partner, and I need to think, using two-option closes, asking for commitment respectfully, and setting clean next steps. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 10-minute role-play for Module 8 where a salesperson recaps guest priorities, presents one best-fit number option, pauses with strategic silence, handles a payment concern, uses a two-option close, and sets clean next steps if the guest does not buy today. Include guest lines, salesperson lines, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
